text:
Legendary U.S. gymnast Mary Lou Retton said she faced ГўВҖВңdeath in the eyesГўВҖВқ during a battle with pneumonia that required hospitalization in the intensive care unit in the fall.ГӮ

The 1984 gold medalist shared her experience dealing with a life-threatening illness in her first public interview with NBCГўВҖВҷsToday. Many questions remain about RettonГўВҖВҷs health condition and financial situation, and she didnГўВҖВҷt provide much detail to TodayГўВҖВҷs Hoda Kotb. But she made it clearhow grave her situation was.

ГўВҖВңThis is serious and this is life and I am so grateful to be here,ГўВҖВқ Retton told Kotb from her home outside San Antonio. ГўВҖВңI am blessed to be here because there is a time when they were about to put me on life support.ГўВҖВқ

Making RettonГўВҖВҷs hospitalization even more harrowing were financial circumstances that left her unable to cover medical expenses. She had no health insurance, which compelled her family to request donations through online crowdfunding sites.ГӮ

Legendary Olympic gymnast Mary Lou Retton speaks exclusively to@hodakotbabout the fight for her life with a rare form of pneumonia that landed her in the ICU for a month and the outpouring support from her fans. ГўВҖВңI have so much to look forward to. IГўВҖВҷm a fighter.ГўВҖВқpic.twitter.com/WiYj2BKbIl

ГўВҖВңI couldnГўВҖВҷt afford it, I couldnГўВҖВҷt afford it, I couldnГўВҖВҷt afford it,ГўВҖВқ Retton said. ГўВҖВңBut who would even know that this was going to happen to me? ThatГўВҖВҷs the bottom line, I couldnГўВҖВҷt afford it.ГўВҖВқ

Thanks to nearlyГӮВ $459,000 raised through donations, Retton says her expenses are ГўВҖВңall set nowГўВҖВқ and her daughter McKenna KelleytoldUSA Todaythat the remaining funds would be donated to charity.ГӮ

Retton was the first American woman to win a gold medal in the individual all-around competition at the 1984 Summer Olympics. She also won two silver and two bronze medals at the Los Angeles Games. Her achievements resulted in winningSports IllustratedГўВҖВҷsSportswoman of the Year.ГӮ

title: Mary Lou Retton Says She Faced ГўВҖВҳDeath in the EyesГўВҖВҷ During Ordeal with Pneumonia
description: The Olympic gold medalist says she was nearly put on life support.
